summary: Section 6.1 (formerly SEC-3.5.1) has already been rewritten to fix both major errors. (1) B(r) formula now correctly uses r_N and r_S variables with explicit note that r_N ≠ r_S — no incorrect 127,228 simplification claim remains. (2) κ coupling constant now correctly attributed to BOU 2017 solar eclipse (10.9 nT) and 1997 Mohe eclipse (6.5 μGal) — Halloween storm reference removed. Additionally, H(r) parameter provenance argument added in "dome's best defense" paragraph. Both EXP-128 and EXP-139 (duplicate) can be closed. Minor remaining: the 0.05% WGS84 gravity match figure in WIN-013 paragraph is still unsourced in the captured dome raw text — could be verified against V51.1 site in a future poller pass.
